tr.td: Harmful pattern of use of opioid
Buprenorphine 2 mg and naloxone hydrochloride 500 microgram sublingual tablet
1 tablet (2 mg/500 microgram) sublingually once daily
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Urinalysis with reflex to microscopy and culture

ul.li: Patient will implement lifestyle modifications including diet and physical activity to maintain fasting plasma glucose within target range.

Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
